title: EpicFight Sword Light Modifications
description: Adjusted the swing trails in EpicFight to make it shine.
body:
**This mod has been redesigned！！！**

**谢谢你，东非大野猪！**

The zylob:acg_trail blade effect included in this mod comes from assets by Epic ACG.

To experience the full version of this mod, please add the Fancy Trail mod.

When you add the Fancy Trai mod or the EpicFight-Nightfall mod, the blade effects from their mod will be automatically added to the list.

This mod is still being updated. Currently, it is only available for version 1.20.1, and future updates will follow. Other versions may be updated later.

Currently, this mod focuses on the Epic Fight mod for the latest version of Minecraft 1.20.1 and will be prioritized for updates.

The current setting replaces the global epicfight:swing_trail blade trail particles, and also generates other particles whenever any blade trail particles are created.


Personal settings will be updated later to avoid affecting other people's sword flashes at the same time.
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/135b62dab798783e0c429c06dbd8777fe9dfbb14.png)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Descriptions are all translated using Bing.（ ）

</details>






Something like that, maybe?





Try to keep the number of overlapping blade flashes to a minimum, because I'm actually generating these particles at the same time as the blade flashes, so having too many overlapping will cause serious lag.

The EpicFight Sword Light Modifications Team
